title: callicarpa longipes var. longipes
intro: Callicarpa longipes var. longipes, also known as the purple fruit callicarpa, is a variety of flowering plant in the lamiaceae family, characterized by its vibrant purple fruit. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa longipes var. longipes include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Callicarpa longipes var. longipes is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its herbal remedies.
